name: Mex-Corn Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 package (16 oz) low fat cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain.
2. Add corn, tomato sauce, picante sauce, chili powder, and cumin to the skillet. Stir frequently.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, mix cottage cheese, eggs, Parmesan cheese, oregano, garlic salt, and shredded cheese until well combined.
5. Arrange 6 tortillas on the bottom of a lightly greased 13x9x2 inch baking dish, overlapping as needed.
6. Spread half of the meat mixture over the tortillas.
7. Sprinkle with the cheese mixture.
8. Cover with remaining tortillas, overlapping as necessary.
9. Top with the rest of the meat mixture.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
11. Remove from oven and sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving with additional picante sauce.
